title: monarda fistulosa var. rubra
intro: Monarda fistulosa var. rubra, also known as red bee balm or red bergamot mint, is a variety of the bee balm plant, which belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. The health benefits of red bee balm include its ability to soothe sore throats, calm anxiety and stress, and provide relief from colds and flu, making it a popular herbal remedy. Red bee balm can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal blends to promote overall well-being and immune system function.
